creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 194307
v1

Hi there

I would like to ask for an exp-run to update math/gsl to 2.5.

The patch is attached and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/gsl-2.5.v1.diff



thanks, and mfg Tobias


Btw, you could also add to the exp-run if possible: 
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/digikam-fiv.v2.diff
to try and get digikam to build on the builder.
